A decentralized stream-to-earn Music-fi & NFT Ecosystem
  • Features
  • Stream to earn
  • Whitepaper
Features
Stream to earn

Fans earn tokenized rewards from streaming, grooving and sharing their favourite artist’s songs. Through the music Influencer’s hub Fans can make money promoting music they love on social media through short videos “Grooves”!

Music Collabs

GrooveUP is doing for MUSIC
what Rotten Tomato does for films/movies.
Fans stream and review music by Emerging Artists for global audience discovery.
Fans earn money ($GROOVE) by reviewing the music they love!





NFTs
Artist tokens

What we’re building

Grooveup enables artists' to grow an active fanbase and raise seed funds whilst rewarding the fans for actively streaming & sharing their music, seemlessly administered using smart contracts and NFTs!

STREAMING SERVICE
ARTIST NFT MARKETPLACE
TOKEN REWARDS FROM ARTISTS
FAN ROOM

A Multi-network Token

The Grooveup token will be made available via multiple platforms, using a token blockchain bridge system. Users (groovers) can access the tokens on all chains using the apps multi-chain in-built wallet.
